risinfo.chaptertitle: Appendix II. Test Your Knowledge! Answer Key

sect1.title: Chapter 9
sect1.para: 1. b. CCM is reported by a physician or QHP who provides or oversees the management and/or coordination of services, as needed, for all the patient's health care needs.
2. d. PCM services require development, monitoring, or revision of disease-specific care plan for a patient.

listitem.para: Complex CCM requires at least 60 minutes of clinical staff time and moderate or high MDM.

sect1.para: 4. b. On a date when no other E/M service is furnished to the patient, the treating/requesting physician or QHP who spends 16 to 30 minutes preparing for the referral and/or communicating with the consultant may report the service with 99452.

5. b. False. Indirect prolonged services may be reported in relation to any level or category of E/M service that was or will be provided on another date of service regardless of whether time was used to select the level of the face-to-face service.
